theme: Seville — Spain's best-kept secret for corporate incentives

linkedin.text:
Everyone goes to Barcelona.

But if you want your team to experience something they can't stop talking about — go to Seville.

Seville is what Barcelona was 15 years ago: authentic, affordable, and impossibly beautiful.

For corporate events:

🌺 Flamenco dinner show in a centuries-old palace courtyard
🍊 Tapas route through the Triana district with a local guide
🏟️ Real Maestranza bullring (historical tour, not a show — no controversy)
🌴 Alcázar royal palace — private evening access
🥘 Andalusian cooking class with seasonal produce from the market

Logistics:
→ Direct flight from Tel Aviv (Air Europa, Iberia)
→ Warm weather April–November
→ Hotels at 35–40% lower cost than Barcelona
→ Zero tourist fatigue — your team has the city to themselves

Our team has partners on the ground in Seville. We've been building this destination for 2026.

If your team deserves Spain — but you want the version that impresses even people who've been to Barcelona — this is it.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Seville #Spain #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #UproductionEvents #MICE #Andalusia #EventDestination #TeamBuilding
